wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.labelHelp: An optional tag shown alongside your wallet name.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.currencyHelp: All amounts are shown in this currency. Multi-currency conversion isn’t enabled yet.
preferences.themeHelp: Applies instantly, on this device only.
preferences.firstDayHelp: Used by the Calendar and weekly reports.

reports.title: Email reports
reports.summaryDesc: Emailed on the 1st (last month) and the 15th (this month so far).

password.title: Password
password.changeDesc: Change the password you sign in with.
password.setDesc: Set a password so you can also sign in with email.
password.minLength: New password must be at least 8 characters

pin.title: PIN lock
pin.descEnabled: A PIN is required to open the app on this device.
pin.descDisabled: Require a PIN to open the app (this device).
pin.info: The PIN only gates the app on your devices; your data stays intact. If you forget it, disable it here while the app is unlocked.

wealth.title: Net Worth lock
wealth.hideLabel: Hide Net Worth behind a passcode
wealth.descEnabled: Logins open in the everyday view; the Net Worth section stays hidden until unlocked.
wealth.descDisabled: Require a separate passcode to reveal the Net Worth section.
wealth.infoLocked: Unlock Net Worth from the account menu to change or disable this passcode.
wealth.infoDefault: The everyday login can be shared safely — Net Worth (holdings & net-worth totals) stays hidden until the passcode is entered. Income, expenses and cash flow are always visible.
wealth.dialogHelp: Keep this separate from your login password. Anyone with just the login sees everyday spending — never your Net Worth.
wealth.lockDisabledDesc: The Net Worth section is visible on every login now.
wealth.lockEnabledDesc: New logins start in the everyday view; unlock with your passcode to reveal Net Worth.

data.title: Data
data.exportDescBefore: All transactions across every account. Optionally limit to a date range. Saved as
data.importDesc: Upload a CSV or Excel (.xlsx) file. Missing categories & accounts are created automatically.

wealthUnlock.title: Unlock Net Worth
wealthUnlock.description: Enter your wealth passcode to reveal the Net Worth section for this session.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.descEnabled: A code from your authenticator app is required at sign-in.
twoFactor.descDisabled: Require a one-time code from an authenticator app when you sign in.
twoFactor.emailFallbackDesc: Also allow a code emailed to you if you lose your authenticator.
twoFactor.enrollDesc: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy, or a similar app, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.
twoFactor.manualKey: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
twoFactor.saveCodesDesc: Each code works once. Store them somewhere safe — they're the only way in if you lose your authenticator. They won't be shown again.
twoFactor.disableDescPassword: Confirm your password to turn off 2FA.
twoFactor.disableDescCode: Enter a current authenticator or backup code to turn off 2FA.
twoFactor.regenDesc: This invalidates your old codes. Enter a current authenticator or backup code to continue.
